title: Make oscore_ctx struct opaque with accessor functions only
description: oscore.h:206-234 currently exposes all key material in public struct. Follow the existing comment block: hide definition in .c, provide only oscore_ctx_create(), oscore_ctx_free(), oscore_ctx_get() etc. Update all call sites. P0 security. Parent of project-LICHEN-iaui
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks (iaui.1.1 opaque struct hide, iaui.1.2 accessors, iaui.1.3 update tests, iaui.1.4? coap integration). Following bead work instructions for complex P0 task. Now treated as epic.
